intersection_definition: DepMap 24Q4 (OncotreeLineage=Breast, n=96) INNER JOIN GDSC2 fitted dose-response actually-screened BRCA lines (TCGA_DESC=BRCA, n=51) on SangerModelID; name-join fully concordant (51==51)

antiHER2_ERBB2_amplified.label_basis: DepMap 24Q4 ERBB2 relative copy-number >= 2.0 (objective) for lines with CN; literature for 3 CN-missing HER2+ lines

antiHER2_drug_validation: ERBB2-amp lines dominate the sensitive tail of GDSC2 Lapatinib/Afatinib/Sapitinib Z-scores (see _her2_drug_zscore.csv)

sources.depmap: DepMap 24Q4 Public: Model.csv (figshare file 51065297), OmicsCNGene.csv ERBB2 col (file 51065324); article 27993248
sources.receptor_annotation: Neve 2006 Cancer Cell 10:515; Dai 2017 J Cancer 8:3131; Marcotte 2016 Cell 164:293; DSMZ/ATCC; Cellosaurus

caveats: ER/PR/TNBC labels are literature-curated (not re-measured); HER2 axis is DepMap-CN-backed where CN exists.
MDAMB453 (rel_CN 2.18, borderline) counted HER2+ per molecular-apocrine convention; medium confidence.
4 obscure lines (COLO824, MRKNU1, OCUBM, YMB1E) left unknown rather than guessed; excluded from all axis counts.
GDSC side = GDSC2 actually-screened BRCA lines; using Cell_Lines_Details (annotation-only, 51 too) gives same set.
